tagline: The Art of Swimming Pools and Spas

hero.badge_1: BBB A+ Rated  |  Serving SE Wisconsin Since 1998
hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built One Project
at a Time
hero.subheadline: For over 27 years, Wisconsin families have trusted us to design and build pools that turn backyards into personal retreats. From custom construction to ongoing care, we handle every detail so you can simply enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Solutions<br class="hidden md:block">From Build to Maintenance
services.subtitle: Whether you are dreaming of a brand-new pool or need expert care for the one you have, our team brings 27+ years of hands-on experience to every project in Southeastern Wisconsin.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Full design and build services for inground swimming pools, tailored to your property, style, and budget. Proven construction techniques and quality equipment for results that last decades.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Services
cards.description: Sales, installation, and expert service for all makes and models of hot tubs and swim spas. Find the perfect relaxation solution for your Wisconsin home with guidance from our team.

cards.title: Pool Liner Replacement
cards.description: Restore your pool's appearance and prevent leaks with professional liner replacement. We use high-quality materials for long-lasting durability and a fresh new look.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, saltwater systems, automation, and autocovers. We upgrade your pool equipment for improved efficiency, convenience, and lower operating costs.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Complete renovation and redesign of existing pools to modernize the look, improve functionality, and boost your property value. Transform your outdated pool into a showpiece.

cards.title: Water Features & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Custom water features, outdoor kitchens, bars, and living spaces designed to transform your backyard into the ultimate outdoor sanctuary for family and friends.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your dream pool or current service needs. We will schedule a free on-site consultation and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate tailored to your property and budget.

steps.title: We Bring It to Life
steps.description: Our experienced team handles every detail from custom design through construction or service. We build one quality project at a time so nothing gets rushed and every detail is right.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your backyard is transformed into a personal oasis. And with our ongoing maintenance and support, your pool stays pristine while you simply enjoy the water with family and friends.

about.label: Why Wisconsin Families Choose Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Craftsmanship Since 1998
about.description: Accurate Pool & Spa Services was built on a simple promise: one quality project at a time. For over 27 years, Paul and the team have worked closely with each client across Watertown, Lake Country, and Southeastern Wisconsin to create custom pools and spas that fit their vision and budget. Our reputation has been built through customer referrals, and that says everything about how we do business.

features.title: 27+ Years Hands-On Experience
features.description: Every project benefits from decades of real-world pool construction and service knowledge. No subcontractors, no shortcuts.

features.title: One Project at a Time Focus
features.description: We dedicate our full attention to each build. Your project never competes with a dozen others for our time and care.

features.title: Financing Options Available
features.description: Your dream pool should not have to wait. We work with lending partners to offer flexible payment plans that fit your budget.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, honest estimate. We work with your budget to deliver the best possible result — no hidden fees, no bait-and-switch.

guarantee.headline: Our Craftsmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build and every service we perform. If something is not right, we come back and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charges. After 27+ years in business, our name is our reputation, and we protect it on every single project.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool projects take 6-10 weeks depending on design complexity, permits, and weather. We will give you a realistic timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated every step of the way.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service all inground pools in the Watertown, Lake Country, and Southeastern Wisconsin area regardless of who built them. Our maintenance, repair, and upgrade services are available for any pool owner.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Watertown, Lake Country, and all of Southeastern Wisconsin. If you are unsure whether you are in our service area, just give Paul a call at (920) 988-1157 and we will let you know.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We work with lending partners to offer flexible financing options. During your free consultation, we can discuss payment plans that fit your budget so your dream pool does not have to wait.

faqs.question: Do you sell and install hot tubs and swim spas?
faqs.answer: Yes! We carry luxury spas and swim spas with full installation and ongoing service. Call to schedule a consultation and we will help you find the perfect spa for your home and lifestyle.

testimonials.name: Leah W.
testimonials.text: Paul was wonderful in helping us out. He answered my millions of questions, made sure we had the supplies and preplanning we needed, and was available evenings and weekends. We will be making the drive to Watertown for all of our pool needs!

testimonials.name: Chris B.
testimonials.text: Our pool looks great, and they made it happen before Memorial Day! The whole process was smooth and the team really delivered on their promise of quality craftsmanship.

testimonials.name: Trent N.
testimonials.text: Paul is always great to work with and he always fits us in his busy schedule. After years of working with Accurate Pool, I would not trust anyone else with our pool.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation from a family-owned team with 27+ years of experience. We will visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide an honest estimate.
